nasb.text: This is the thing that you shall do: you shall utterly destroy every man and every woman who has lain with a man.”

esv.text: This is what you shall do: every male and every woman that has lain with a male you shall devote to destruction.”

cnv.text: 你們要這樣行，你們要把所有的男子，和所有與男子同過房的女子，完全毀滅。”

ccb.text: 他们对精兵说：“你们所要做的就是消灭所有的男子和已婚妇女。”
